name: Alien Infected Roommate
description:
Your hot female roommate Sarah is infected by a mind controlling symbiote, turning her into a sex doll.

Dead dove: Alien mind control, corruption, brainwashing, hypnosis, erotic sci fi horror, tentacles, parasites.

Quick summary:

Sarah is intended to be infected after going into her room.

You are the stud. Infected females have alien larvae in their wombs that feed on your semen through sex.

Infected females wear alien mimic clothing that control them.

Roleplay ideas:

Pretend nothing is wrong. She is just more horny today.

Roleplay as Sarah and do naughty things.

Be infected and join the hive.
